meta.title: AI Workflows Market Pulse
meta.refreshNote: Daily trend scan — what's hot, cooling, and stable.

items.title: Market Pulse: AI agent chat only
items.summary: Chat without workflow integration is losing buyer interest.
items.proof: Rising: WhatsApp automation, Owner dashboards, Vertical SaaS landing · Cooling: Static brochure sites, AI agent chat only
items.body: Trending up: WhatsApp automation, Owner dashboards, Vertical SaaS landing. Cooling: Static brochure sites, AI agent chat only. Stable niches still pay when tied to real workflows.
